notes: Level 5 manual review override shard for spell indexes 55-57 in generated discovery row order.
Formatting drift observed in wall-of-stone and wrath-of-nature JSON is intentionally kept as a review-surface issue, not a mechanics defect in this shard.

wall-of-light::choice_or_mode.issue: The wall orientation choices are represented by spatial form notes; no separate choice bucket is required for this pass.

wall-of-light::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The initial Constitution save and Blinded save branch are represented, but the end-turn damage branch and action-launched ranged spell attack branch remain flattened into prose.
wall-of-light::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add separate recurring area-damage and wall-beam attack branches.
wall-of-light::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add on-end-turn wall damage and caster-action beam attack effects with shared scaling.

wall-of-light::repeat_save_or_recurring_.closedReason: Wall of Light now records end-turn wall damage as structured Recurring Mechanics and runtime recurringMechanics data; the Blinded repeat save remains typed.
wall-of-light::repeat_save_or_recurring_.issue: The Blinded repeat save is represented, but the recurring end-turn wall damage is not represented as its own repeat trigger.
wall-of-light::repeat_save_or_recurring_.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repeat trigger fields for end-turn area damage that is independent of the initial save.
wall-of-light::repeat_save_or_recurring_.recommendedJsonChange: Add a recurring damage effect triggered when a creature ends its turn in the wall.

wall-of-light::terrain_or_surface.issue: The wall size, thickness, orientation, and free-floating/resting placement are represented by areaOfEffect and spatialDetails.
wall-of-light::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No new terrain/surface field required for this pass.

wall-of-light::vision_light_sound.issue: Bright and dim light radii are measured in spatial details, but the light emission and line-of-sight blocking are not represented as utility/runtime light or vision-blocking behavior.
wall-of-light::vision_light_sound.recommendedTemplateChange: Add emitted-light and line-of-sight-blocking fields for created areas.
wall-of-light::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Add utility light data and a typed vision-blocking flag for the wall.

wall-of-light::created_object_or_structu.issue: The created wall's pass-through rule, line-of-sight blocking, and shrinking length are not represented as typed structure properties.
wall-of-light::created_object_or_structu.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structure pass-through, sight-blocking, and mutable-dimension fields.

wall-of-light::status_or_state_change.issue: The Blinded condition now uses a Constitution save, 1-minute duration, and Constitution repeat save at turn end.
wall-of-light::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for Blinded in this pass.

wall-of-light::conditional_ending.issue: Beam use reduces the wall length by 10 feet whether the attack hits or misses, and the spell ends when the length reaches 0 feet; runtime lacks this ending condition.
wall-of-light::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mutable dimension and zero-length ending fields.
wall-of-light::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallLengthReduction and zeroLengthEnds data.

wall-of-stone::choice_or_mode.issue: The standard and tall panel forms are represented as spatial forms; finer wall-shaping consequences remain tracked in structure/surface buckets.
wall-of-stone::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No new panel-choice field required for this pass.

wall-of-stone::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The enclosure Dexterity save is present in structured prose but not modeled as a distinct runtime save branch with reaction movement on success.
wall-of-stone::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add enclosure save branch fields for created barriers.

wall-of-stone::reaction_or_opportunity_r.issue: A successful enclosure save lets the creature use its Reaction to move up to its Speed out of the enclosure; runtime lacks that reaction movement grant.

wall-of-stone::movement_or_repositioning.issue: Reaction movement out of enclosure is not represented as a movement outcome.
wall-of-stone::movement_or_repositioning.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement outcome fields linked to enclosure saves.

wall-of-stone::forced_movement.issue: If the wall cuts through a creature's space, the creature is pushed to a caster-chosen side; runtime lacks this displacement effect.

wall-of-stone::terrain_or_surface.issue: Panel dimensions and unsupported-span threshold are represented, but merge-with-existing-stone, bridge/ramp support, no-occupied-space placement, and crude shaping remain prose-only.
wall-of-stone::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall support, merge-surface, occupied-space exclusion, and shaping fields.

wall-of-stone::created_object_or_structu.issue: The wall is created and partially sized, but nonmagical object status, permanence, dispel immunity after permanence, and collapse relationships are not typed.

wall-of-stone::object_stats_or_damageabi.issue: Each panel's AC 15, 30 hit points per inch of thickness, poison/psychic immunity, breach behavior, and possible connected-panel collapse remain prose-only.
wall-of-stone::object_stats_or_damageabi.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-panel object stat and collapse fields.

wall-of-stone::conditional_ending.issue: Closed: Wall of Stone now records full-duration concentration making the wall permanent and non-dispellable.
wall-of-stone::conditional_ending.recommendedTemplateChange: Closed by Duration Progression fields for full_duration_concentration and non_dispellable_permanent outcome.
wall-of-stone::conditional_ending.closedReason: Wall of Stone now records its full-concentration permanence rule in structured markdown and runtime JSON. The panel object stats, breach behavior, disappearance fallback, and possible connected-panel collapse remain open under object_stats_or_damageability and aftermath_or_memory.

wall-of-stone::aftermath_or_memory.issue: The post-duration permanent wall, non-dispellable state, disappearance fallback, and possible panel-collapse aftermath are not typed.

wrath-of-nature::choice_or_mode.issue: The spell has grass/undergrowth, tree, root/vine, and rock submodes with separate target and timing rules; runtime only stores partial damage/status effects.

wrath-of-nature::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Tree and root saves have been corrected, but the bonus-action rock ranged spell attack, 3d8 bludgeoning damage, and follow-up Strength save against prone remain under-modeled.
wrath-of-nature::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime rockAttackBranch and treeSaveBranch data.

wrath-of-nature::sustain_or_recast_actio.issue: The caster can use a bonus action each turn to launch a loose rock; runtime lacks the granted bonus action and its target restrictions.
wrath-of-nature::sustain_or_recast_actio.recommendedJsonChange: Add grantedActions entry for the rock launch action.

wrath-of-nature::terrain_or_surface.issue: Grass or undergrowth in the cube becomes difficult terrain for enemies, but runtime lacks enemy-only difficult terrain tied to those surfaces.

wrath-of-nature::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched visible point and visible rock-target selection, which are already represented by lineOfSight targeting or belong under the rock action branch.
wrath-of-nature::vision_light_sound.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by lineOfSight targeting and the open rock action branch.

wrath-of-nature::summon_or_controlled_en.issue: The spell animates trees, rocks, grasses, and undergrowth as hostile environmental actors, but runtime does not model animated terrain/entities as controlled sources.

wrath-of-nature::status_or_state_change.issue: Restrained and Prone are partially represented after save corrections, but root target choice, spell-save-DC Athletics escape, and the rock branch's prone follow-up still need first-class data.
wrath-of-nature::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add submode-linked status and escape fields.
wrath-of-nature::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime rootRestraint and rockProneBranch data.

wrath-of-nature::environmental_change.issue: The cube's trees, rocks, grasses, and undergrowth become animated until the spell ends, but runtime lacks typed environmental animation state.

wrath-of-nature::conditional_ending.issue: The animated terrain and root restraint use the normal concentration duration; no special nonstandard ending condition is present beyond the open submode details.
wrath-of-nature::conditional_ending.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by duration/concentration, with submode details tracked in other buckets.
